# 0UTLYER

> 0UTLYER is a UK-based film and television production company founded by Coldplay's Chris Martin and Emmanuel Kelly. The company features differently-abled, neurodivergent, psychologically divergent, and primary-carer talent in front of the camera, off-screen, and on stage.

## About

0UTLYER is a full-service entertainment production company, committed to featuring 0UTLYERS in front of the camera, off-screen and on stage. The company was founded on the principle that if you are differently-abled, neuro or psychologically divergent, have an exclusory condition, or are a primary carer — you are an 0UTLYER.

## Founders

- [Emmanuel Kelly](https://www.0utlyer.com/team#emmanuel-kelly) — Co-CEO & Co-Founder
- [Joanne Reay](https://www.0utlyer.com/team#joanne-reay) — Co-CEO & Co-Founder
- [Chris Martin](https://www.0utlyer.com/team#chris-martin) — Honorary Founder & President

## Our Productions

- [Dream Fever](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/dream-fever): An emotionally charged documentary on the journey of Emmanuel Kelly. (In Development, 2026)
- [Crewel Work](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/crewel-work): An Elizabethan murder mystery with an interactive twist. (In Development, 2026)
- [Wolf Who Chased The Sun](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/wolf-who-chased-the-sun): A turn-of-the-century duel between an outlaw wolf and a solitary hunter. (In Development, 2026)
- [Slippery Beast](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/slippery-beast): A classic whodunnit told in a highly innovative way. (In Development, 2026)
- [Game of Hearts](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/game-of-hearts): A modern re-imagining of the hugely popular opera Cosi Fan Tutte. (In Development, 2026)
- [The Widow Man](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/the-widow-man): A widow accepts the sheriff’s badge — and the man who keeps her alive. (In Development, 2026)
- [Mission Creep](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/mission-creep): An elite marine unit’s retrieval mission collides with something darker. (In Development, 2026)
- [An Orc In New York](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/an-orc-in-new-york): A fresh take on a timeless tale — when we seek to save another, we often save ourselves. (In Development, 2026)
- [Something Blue](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects/something-blue): Murder demands the same precious attention to detail as your wedding day. (In Development, 2026)

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.0utlyer.com/): brand and mission overview
- [Production Services](https://www.0utlyer.com/production-services): 0utLoud, 0utGun, and 0utRageous
- [Training & Recruitment](https://www.0utlyer.com/training-recruitment): 0utShine training and recruitment
- [Our Productions](https://www.0utlyer.com/projects): the full 0UTLYER slate
- [Team](https://www.0utlyer.com/team): full team and bios
- [Partners](https://www.0utlyer.com/partners): collaborators and aligned organisations
- [Legacy](https://www.0utlyer.com/legacy): The Kingdom of O — Cambridge partnership
- [Contact](https://www.0utlyer.com/#contact): inquiries and partnership
